---
title: "how feature selection works"
author: "Haoyu Ji"
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
date: today
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
if (!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("here")
setwd(here::here())
```

```{r dat, eval=FALSE}
library(IMIFA)
data(olive)

st <- storeControl(
  mu.switch   = TRUE,
  score.switch= FALSE, 
  load.switch = TRUE,
  psi.switch  = TRUE,
  pi.switch   = TRUE
)

mgp <- mgpControl(
  active.crit = "BD",
  eps  = 0.1,  
  prop = 0.7  
)

simIMIFA <- mcmc_IMIFA(
  olive, method="IMIFA",
  n.iters=50000,
  storage = st,
  MGP     = mgp,
  verbose = FALSE
)
saveRDS(simIMIFA, file = here::here('data', "simIMIFA_olive.rds"), compress = "xz")
resIMIFA <- get_IMIFA_results(simIMIFA, z.avgsim=TRUE)
saveRDS(resIMIFA, file = here::here('data', "resIMIFA_olive.rds"), compress = "xz")
```

```{r}
feature_select_IMIFA <- function(res, eps = 0.1, p_cut = 0.9) {
  G <- length(res$Loadings$lmats)
  out <- vector("list", G)

  for (g in seq_len(G)) {
    L <- res$Loadings$lmats[[g]]  # p x q_g x S_g
    if (is.null(L)) { out[[g]] <- data.frame(); next }
    if (length(dim(L)) == 2L) L <- array(L, dim = c(nrow(L), ncol(L), 1L))

    p <- dim(L)[1]; S <- dim(L)[3]

    maxabs <- apply(abs(L), c(1, 3), max)
    if (is.vector(maxabs)) maxabs <- matrix(maxabs, nrow = p, ncol = S)

    p_active    <- rowMeans(maxabs > eps)
    mean_maxabs <- rowMeans(maxabs)

    comm <- apply(L^2, c(1, 3), sum)
    if (is.vector(comm)) comm <- matrix(comm, nrow = p, ncol = S)

    psi_bar <- res$Uniquenesses$post.psi[, g]
    psi_mat <- matrix(psi_bar, nrow = p, ncol = S)
    h2      <- comm / (comm + psi_mat)
    mean_h2 <- rowMeans(h2)

    feat_names <- rownames(res$Loadings$post.load[[g]])
    if (is.null(feat_names)) feat_names <- paste0("V", seq_len(p))

    out[[g]] <- data.frame(
      feature     = feat_names,
      p_active    = p_active,
      mean_maxabs = mean_maxabs,
      mean_h2     = mean_h2,
      selected    = (p_active >= p_cut)
    )
    out[[g]] <- out[[g]][order(out[[g]]$p_active, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  }

  names(out) <- paste0("Cluster_", seq_len(G))
  out
}

resIMIFA <- readRDS(here::here('data', "resIMIFA_olive.rds"))
fs <- feature_select_IMIFA(resIMIFA, eps = 0.1, p_cut = 0.9)
```

```{r}
fs_long <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(fs), function(cl) {
  df <- fs[[cl]]
  df$cluster <- cl
  df
}))

fs_long <- fs_long[, c("cluster","feature","p_active","mean_maxabs","mean_h2","selected")]


features <- sort(unique(fs_long$feature))
clusters <- sort(unique(fs_long$cluster))

p_active_wide <- data.frame(feature = features)

for (cl in clusters) {
  tmp <- fs_long[fs_long$cluster == cl, c("feature","p_active")]
  p_active_wide[[paste0("p_active_", cl)]] <- tmp$p_active[match(features, tmp$feature)]
}

p_active_wide

selected_wide <- data.frame(feature = features)
for (cl in clusters) {
  tmp <- fs_long[fs_long$cluster == cl, c("feature","selected")]
  selected_wide[[paste0("selected_", cl)]] <- tmp$selected[match(features, tmp$feature)]
}
sel_mat <- as.matrix(selected_wide[ , -1, drop=FALSE])
selected_wide$n_selected_clusters <- rowSums(sel_mat, na.rm=TRUE)
selected_wide[order(-selected_wide$n_selected_clusters), ]
```


```{r}
g <- 1
eps  <- 0.1
prop <- 0.7

L <- resIMIFA$Loadings$lmats[[g]]
if (length(dim(L)) == 2L) L <- array(L, dim=c(nrow(L), ncol(L), 1L))

col_prop0 <- apply(abs(L) < eps, c(2, 3), mean)  # q_g x n_iter
matplot(t(col_prop0), type="l", lty=1,
        xlab="Iteration (retained)", ylab=paste0("Pr(|loading|<", eps, ") within column"))
abline(h=prop, lty=2)
title(paste0("Cluster ", g, ": near-zero proportion per factor column"))
```

```{r}
n_feat <- sapply(fs, function(df) sum(df$selected, na.rm = TRUE))

q_g <- c(6,3,3,4,2,6)

data.frame(cluster = names(fs), q_g = q_g, n_selected_features = n_feat)
```
